experiences.supervisor: Nils Trepstra, Head of Data and Analytics
Nils Trepstra, Head of Data and Analytics
description: Handling of noisy, non-stationary and volatile nature of data to model volatility of energy system
Approximating data backfill from distribution profile

Energy load forecasting via statistical methods to construct most probable consumption pattern in various states of Australia. Some methods include quartile forecasting, long/short term time series modelling
Time series handling of PV solar data. Decomposition for detrending and effect removal to support forward forecast of PV load
Effect removal and smoothing algorithms to distribute load spikes for materialisation of negative/positive impact to PnL in a controlled manner
Robust optimization models for uncertain market prices and load, using defined uncertainty sets to support business decisions that reduce downside risk under adverse market conditions
Building PnL models for downstream users to formulate position to hedge against

experiences.supervisor: Nils Trepstra, Head of Data and Analytics
description: Predictive modelling of demand and supply of the SG energy market through bid ask simulation for spot price and day ahead forecast
Battery Energy Storage Systems (BESS) simulation and analysis of arbitrage opportunity to drive potential new revenue stream

Feature engineering and time series analysis in Python to build ML such as XGBoost and tree based models. Further exploration was also done to test feasibility of DNN models like LSTM and Attention networks to capture temporal and recurrence nature of data
Data engineering work using Dagster for ETL purposes to transform data pulled from API into data lake which is later then transformed into data cube
Orchestrated robust data flows from data lake to Snowflake warehouse, including schema design, incremental loading strategies for downstream usage of further modelling of energy demand and price
Python concurrent and parallel programming to optimise program compute time
Building of data and feature marts in Snowflake (SQL)
Exploratory data analysis, data profiling, data mapping and data validation
Data analytics and business intelligence through visualisation tools (Power BI) for internal departments and key management
Operating in cross-functional team under AGILE framework
Predictive analytics to drive revenue by leveraging on big data and machine learning techniques (Python sklearn, Supervised and unsupervised learning)
Finance operations & Managerial accounting.
Improving existing financial tracking processes and workflows
Preparations of key account statements (BS,P&L)
Tableau (Prep and Cloud) ETL pipeline.
Conceptualized green finance business model through data analytics
Developed targeted green strategies for various sectors and executed digital marketing strategies
Formulated actionable tactics to promote green businesses
Promoted sustainable growth and development in alignment with SG goals through good ESG practices
